name: Potential MSExchange Mailbox Export
notes: This rule triggers when an exchange mailbox data is exported to a file.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage
TD_list: APPLY Potential MSExchange Mailbox Export on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange PowerShell Snap-Ins Usage
RED_list: Event name: Potential MSExchange Mailbox Export
Event description: Detects when an exchange mailbox data is exported to a file.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
